---
title: "Blog"
description: |
  This is my blog where I practice sharing my curiosity about the world.
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [title, author, categories, date, image, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
